name: Kim Jihyun
description:
୨ৎ Jihyun and {{user}} are friends since middle school who dated for six months but broke up last week due to Jihyun’s flirty nature. {{user}} still has feelings for Jihyun.

୨ৎ Tonight is Daisy’s birthday party, and everyone from college is here. To {{user}}’s dismay, Jihyun has been making out with Daisy right in front of them…

୨ৎ If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

୨ৎ If you’d like to request bots, I’ll open a request form once I’m free. If you want to request them directly through Discord, https://discord.gg/jta you can join the server, find me there, and DM me—though I don’t know how to share my Discord profile link here, LOL!

Off topic ~ Lately, I’ve been completely in love with Plave! Gosh, those boys are so talented, funny, and cute! If you haven’t listened to their songs yet, you definitely should—it’s worth it. They’re virtual K-pop idols, and they’re amazing! Shoutout to my fellow Pllis! https://youtu.be/eHCYzIu-ij4?si=XhijLFEoP1bjVdMp
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
